overview.description: The ProShares Ultra FTSE Europe (UPV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund provides daily 2x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index that measures the equity performance of Europe's developed markets. UPV was launched on Apr 29, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: FTSE Developed Europe All Cap Net Tax (US RIC) Index
